title: Courkrus

'''Courkrus''', also called '''Khuiumin 4''',<ref name="IJ" /> or simply '''Khuiumin''',<ref name="AtPA" /> was the primary [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of the [[Khuiumin system/Legends|Khuiumin system]] in the [[Khuiumin sector/Legends|Khuiumin sector]], located in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]].

==Description==
Courkrus was a semi arid [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that supported a modest population of [[Human/Legends|Human]] settlers, plus the usual migrants of other [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. Irrigation and modern [[Farm/Legends|farming]] techniques allowed the planet to develop to the point of being able to provide its own agricultural industry. There were no known exports from Courkrus or the [[Khuiumin system/Legends|Khuiumin system]] in general.

The main trade and economical base for the planet was the largest city, [[Vlarnya]]. It was the only city with [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] facilities. Vlarnya was also responsible for producing one of the planet's only commodities—a variant of [[lomin ale]] that was popular with frequent visitors to the planet.

==History==
Courkrus was the [[Eyttyrmin Batiiv stronghold|base]] of operations for the [[Eyttyrmin Batiiv]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] shortly after the rise of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]]. Eventually the Empire destroyed the bulk of that pirate group at the [[Battle of Khuiumin]]. The broken remnants of the pirate [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] became known as the [[Khuiumin Survivors]]. Some [[Standard year/Legends|years]] later, the world would become the main base for the majority of [[Leonia Tavira]]'s [[Invids|Invid]] pirate support. The pirate groups included [[Jacob Nive]]'s Khuiumin Survivors, the ''[[Red Nova]]'' crew and [[Riistar's Raiders]]. Most of these groups were chased off of Courkrus by [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] trainee [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]], while in search of his [[Marriage/Legends|wife]], [[Mirax Terrik Horn]].

==Behind the scenes==
The planet Khuiumin first appeared in the short story ''[[Against the Pirate Armada]]'', published in [[West End Games]]' ''[[The Star Wars Sourcebook]]'' in [[1987]].<ref name="AtPA" /> It was later identified as both Courkrus and Khuiumin 4 in the [[1998]] novel ''[[I, Jedi]]''.<ref name="IJ" />
